title: Service credit
doc_html:
§1514.  Service credit

A member shall receive credit for all service rendered as a member of the system for which the required contributions have been paid and not withdrawn.  

Acts 1986, No. 1063, §1, eff. Oct. 1, 1986; Redesignated from R.S. 13:938 by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991.

§1514.  Service credit
A member shall receive credit for all service rendered as a member of the system for which the required contributions have been paid and not withdrawn.
Acts 1986, No. 1063, §1, eff. Oct. 1, 1986; Redesignated from R.S. 13:938 by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991.
